name: Levonorgestrel Tablets IP
about: Levonorgestrel Tablets IP is a general medicine that is specifically designed for women. The tablets are solid in form and are to be taken as per the suggestion of the medical practitioner. The medicine is originated from India and is suitable for women. The tablets are to be stored in a dry place to maintain their quality and effectiveness.
